narrativeProgression.summary: An intake anomaly lands across multiple channels before dawn.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: At 11:47 p.m., a voicemail from unit 331 predicts your next text message word for word.

threadUpdates.update: Unit 331 pings alive: At 11:47 p.m., a voicemail from unit 331 predicts your next text message word for word.
Peripheral signal tied to Voicemail waveform anomaly remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Midnight Lockbox - Day 01 police report
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Voicemail waveform anomaly.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox ARG artifact Day 01. Type: police_report. Clue focus: Voicemail waveform anomaly. Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox police_report audio cue for day 1. Clue anchor: Voicemail waveform anomaly. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Voicemail waveform anomaly and tell me if your last call still stands (none).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Voicemail waveform anomaly.

distraction.title: Red Herring 01
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Voicemail waveform anomaly with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
